title: Oxydectes siderophylla
intro: Oxydectes siderophylla, also known as the iron-veined passionflower, is a plant species belonging to the Passifloraceae family, characterized by its unique, iron-veined leaves. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including its anxiolytic and sedative properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. The bioactive constituents of Oxydectes siderophylla include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, such as isoflavones and harman alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and improve sleep quality.
